inputs.fcf_source: FY2026 operating cash flow $2452.0M less capital spending $43.0M ÷ 215.0M diluted shares per ADSK/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260303_rpt20260131_acc0000769397_26_000015.htm
inputs.normalization_note: FY2026 FCF per share anchors owner cash; subscription transition largely complete; RPO $8.3B converts through revenue over time.

bear.notes: Construction slowdown; seat migration friction; margin compression from competition

base.notes: Subscription renewals + construction cloud upsell; RPO converts steadily

bull.notes: AI design tools accelerate ARPU; international AEC share gains

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Asset-light SaaS; no land/NAV misstatement (10-K FY2026)

option_scan.question: Backlog / RPO not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: RPO $8.3B at Jan 31, 2026; recognized over subscription term

growth_explanation.mechanism: Subscription renewals and upsell on AutoCAD, Revit, and Fusion; construction cloud and data platform expansion; partially offset by SBC dilution
growth_explanation.bear_falsifier: Billings growth falls below 5% for four consecutive quarters with flat RPO
growth_explanation.bull_falsifier: FY revenue growth re-accelerates above 15% with stable non-GAAP operating margin

stance_proposal.override_reason: Partial dhando: SBC dilution and competition cap stance despite modest filing IRR

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Four additive components map subscription owner cash, construction cloud/AI option, net financial claims, and transition/competition reserve once each.

components.label: Subscription software owner-cash engine (AutoCAD, Revit, Fusion, AEC/MFG)

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ADSK/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260303_rpt20260131_acc0000769397_26_000015.htm: FY2026 revenue $6743.0M (+18% YoY), OCF $2452.0M, FCF $2409.0M, RPO $8.3B, cash $2249.0M, debt $2483.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2026 10-K and Q1 FY2027 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

inputs.label: FY2026 net cash provided by operating activities
FY2026 payments to acquire property and equipment

assumptions.label: Normalized owner free cash flow per diluted share
assumptions.rationale: FY2026 operating cash flow less capital spending per diluted share; subscription model transition largely complete.

assumptions.label: Growth years 1–5
assumptions.rationale: Lawrence bear/base/bull owner-cash growth; FY2026 revenue +18% YoY supports base.

assumptions.label: Growth years 6–7
assumptions.rationale: Fade after construction-cloud and AI monetization normalize.

assumptions.label: Required return on owner cash
assumptions.rationale: Premium SaaS compounder bounds; not the stance gate.

assumptions.label: Selling multiple in year 7
assumptions.rationale: Lawrence exit multiples 20× / 26× / 30× on year-7 cash path.

assumptions.label: Component schedule adjustment factor
assumptions.rationale: Preserves component schedule while filing facts anchor FY2026 FCF per share.

components.label: Construction cloud, Forma, and AI-assisted design upside option

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ADSK/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260303_rpt20260131_acc0000769397_26_000015.htm: FY2026 revenue $6743.0M (+18% YoY), OCF $2452.0M, FCF $2409.0M, RPO $8.3B, cash $2249.0M, debt $2483.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2026 10-K and Q1 FY2027 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

assumptions.label: Risk-adjusted construction cloud, Forma, and AI design upside
assumptions.rationale: Non-overlapping claim on cloud collaboration and AI-assisted design monetization beyond normalized subscription FCF engine.

calculations.label: Construction cloud and AI option per share

driver_model.timing_basis: RPO converts over 1–3 year subscription terms.

components.label: Net cash and debt claims on common equity

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ADSK/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260303_rpt20260131_acc0000769397_26_000015.htm: FY2026 revenue $6743.0M (+18% YoY), OCF $2452.0M, FCF $2409.0M, RPO $8.3B, cash $2249.0M, debt $2483.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2026 10-K and Q1 FY2027 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

assumptions.label: Cash required for payroll and working capital
assumptions.rationale: Judgment on non-distributable operating liquidity for global SaaS operations.

assumptions.label: Net financial claim on common equity after debt and operating minimum
assumptions.rationale: Q1 FY2027 filing-locked cash less long-term debt; low stresses trapped liquidity.

components.label: Subscription transition, competition, and dilution stress reserve

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ADSK/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260303_rpt20260131_acc0000769397_26_000015.htm: FY2026 revenue $6743.0M (+18% YoY), OCF $2452.0M, FCF $2409.0M, RPO $8.3B, cash $2249.0M, debt $2483.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2026 10-K and Q1 FY2027 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

assumptions.label: Subscription transition, competition, and dilution stress reserve
assumptions.rationale: Negative reserve for seat-to-named-user friction, open-source/Bentley competition, and stock-based compensation dilution not fully embedded in low-growth bear case.

calculations.label: Transition and competition reserve per share

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of ADSK, including subscription owner cash, construction cloud/AI upside, net financial claims, and transition/competition reserve.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Consolidated subscription engine valued through owner-cash discount on FY2026 FCF per share; cloud/AI option, net liquidity, and reserve are separate overlap keys.

economic_value_analysis.accounting_reference: FY2026 10-K: stockholders' equity; economic value in normalized owner cash ($11.2047/sh), not GAAP book alone.

component_groups.label: Subscription software owner-cash engine
component_groups.economic_claim: Global design/engineering subscription normalized free cash flow
component_groups.valuation_basis: Owner-cash discount on FY2026 FCF per diluted share.
component_groups.adjustments: Subscription transition largely complete; FY2026 revenue +18% YoY.

component_groups.label: Construction cloud, Forma, and AI-assisted design upside option
component_groups.economic_claim: Incremental cloud collaboration and AI design monetization beyond normalized FCF
component_groups.valuation_basis: Risk-adjusted milestone value on RPO conversion upside.
component_groups.adjustments: Not in Lawrence base FCF path; RPO $8.3B supports conversion timing.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Base ~40% that construction cloud ARPU uplift sustains mid-single-digit billings growth.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: RPO converts over 1–3 year subscription terms per FY2026 10-K.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Capital-light SaaS; incremental cloud capex minimal vs OCF.

component_groups.label: Net cash and debt claims on common equity
component_groups.economic_claim: Net corporate liquidity after long-term debt and operating minimum
component_groups.valuation_basis: Net asset value on Q1 FY2027 filing-locked cash less debt.
component_groups.adjustments: Operating cash minimum judgment; no double-count with core engine.

component_groups.label: Subscription transition, competition, and dilution stress reserve
component_groups.economic_claim: Seat migration friction, open-source/Bentley competition, SBC dilution
component_groups.valuation_basis: Bounded negative reserve; not full enterprise value haircut.
component_groups.adjustments: Partial dhando: SBC $788M FY2026 offsets buybacks $1.4B.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Subscription software owner-cash engine (AutoCAD, Revit, Fusion, AEC/MFG)
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

valuation_method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.

top_dissents.label: Murray Stahl
top_dissents.falsifier: No asset intensity / pricing power (moat eroding + non-croupier)

top_dissents.label: Horizon Kinetics
top_dissents.falsifier: No dated contractual payoff or royalty/trust structure

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].
